## Description of changes
Please describe your changes here. Include context, what was changed, and why.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation (changes to documentation)

## Testing done
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.
- [ ] I have verified that `./gradlew test` passes.
- [ ] I have added tests to cover my changes (if applicable).

## Screenshots
If this is a UI change, please provide screenshots of the before and after.
[Add screenshots here]

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the Kotlin style guidelines and Clean MVVM architecture.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have verified that `./gradlew lintDebug` passes without introducing new errors.
